productDisplayName: Forever New Women Long Peach Jacket
description: CompositionPeach trench-coat with an outer shell made of 97% cotton and 3% elastane, and lining made of 57% polyester and 43% viscose in a peach polka dot dobby weave, with double breasted buttoned closure on the front, bows on the shoulders, belted waist with bow detailing on the belt loops at the back, pleats emerging from the waistline, sleeve cuffs with button and belt closure, and with insert pockets on the sides below waistlineFittingRegularWash care Dry clean only Cool iron on reverse if necessary Take feminine dressing to the next level with this peach trench coat from forever new. The trench gets a fresh look with the peach colour, bow detailing, golden buttons and the flared waistline. Team this with short lace dresses and ballerina shoes for a really delicate look or wear it with a lace top, jeans and gold coloured flats for casual outings.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in coatsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
